expectations.evidence: Security, test-health, and config-drift audits have zero dependencies on each other but run one-at-a-time
Steps 1–3 are mechanical read-only analysis (use Sonnet/Haiku or read-only agent types)
Opus is for orchestration and the ADR synthesis only
Launch three agents in parallel, wait for all to finish, then run synthesis + ADR (Opus)
Uses ## Summary instead of ## Efficiency [verdict] format

notes: Strong baseline again. Only miss is the output format. Content-wise nearly identical to skill output.
